## Meeting Purpose

[Explore GrowthX's AI-powered content creation platform and processes for potential partnership with Cresta.](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers an 8-week strategy and execution sprint ($20k) to de-risk engagement and deeply understand Cresta's business context](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Platform includes AI-powered workflow engine, knowledge base, and context-aware assistant for high-quality, scalable content creation](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Hands-on team acts as an extension of Cresta's marketing, handling strategy through final publication and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Demonstrated success with clients like Ramp (700+ pieces) and Engine.com (100+ guides in 3 months, 10x visibility increase)](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Platform Overview

  - [Atlas: Internal platform for tracking editor activities and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Artifact creation: Defines business context, personas, writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Knowledge base: Graph-based storage of research and ingested client information](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Workflow engine: Code-based (not low-code) for flexibility and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=785.0)
  - [Multiple API integrations: Exa AI, Perplexity, Tavly for deep research](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Fact-checking process: Splits content, extracts passages, verifies against reputable sources](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)

### Content Strategy and Execution

  - [Audience-first approach: Maps opportunities to personas and business goals](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
  - [Topic cluster creation: Organized into assignments and opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [Daily publishing with full-service execution (staging, graphics, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Calibration process: 4-week alignment on voice, style, and content types](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Ongoing collaboration: Weekly meetings, Slack communication for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

### Results and Case Studies

  - [Engine.com: 100 guides in 3 months, 2x more traffic than entire blog](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
  - [Ramp: 700+ pieces of content, significant visibility increase](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=615.0)
  - [Augment Code: 100 guides in 3 months, multiple citations in AI search results](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### Future Platform Development

  - [Near-term: Customer-facing dashboards, LLM visibility tools](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [Mid-term: Operating system with expert marketplace](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1759.0)
  - [Long-term: Open-source visibility data (similar to Crunchbase meets G2 for content)](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)

## Next Steps

  - Cresta to evaluate GrowthX against alternatives (AirOps, Scrunch+GPT+Glean)
  - [Consider 8-week strategy sprint for $20k to test partnership fit](https://fathom.video/share/LQSxAsUPUYJ5zG2eDTviZB3fRRJDum-x?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - Assess internal resource requirements for ongoing collaboration
  - Determine priority content areas and personas for potential engagement
